title: payment.rs: mark_notes_spent failure leaves notes re-selectable for double-spend; recovery requires full rescan
description: send_payment step 7 marks selected notes spent after broadcast. The code explicitly documents that if mark_notes_spent fails, notes remain 'unspent' in the DB and will be re-selected on the next send, producing a double-spend rejection at the node. Recovery requires a full wallet rescan from seed. The scanner has no nullifier tracking to automatically reconcile this (documented in the code comment). This is an accepted limitation per the comment, but there is no user-facing error path that surfaces the 'please rescan' message to the end user — it only appears in logs at warn level and in mark_spent_warning on the return value. If the caller (daemon or CLI) does not surface mark_spent_warning to the user, the user is left in a silently broken state.
